Ja-pan''' as ''Ryou Kuroyanagi'' ''And many, many more...'' ==Notes== * According to the AnimeNewsNetwork database, Takehito Koyasu has performed over 322 anime voice-acting roles, making him one of the most prolific seiyuu in history. * Was born in Yokohama. * Formed the Weiss group with Miki Shinichiro, [[Tomokazu Seki]] and [[Hiro Yuki]] * Currently operates his own seiyuu management group, and is the creator of ''Weiss Kreuz''. ==Links== [http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=662 Anime News Network Encyclopedia]

html:
Takehito Koyasu
Characters voiced Shigeru Aoba
Birthday 05-05-1967


A selection of other characters voiced by Takehito Koyasu[edit]

Appleseed as Hades

Area 88 as Shin Kazama

Bobobo-bo Bo-bobo as Bobobo-bo Bo-bobo

Crest of the Stars/Banner of the Stars as Baron Klowal Febdash

Full Metal Panic! as Zaidou

Getbackers as Jubei Kakei

Gungrave as Ballabird Lee

Hellsing as Luke Valentine

Kaleido Star as Fool

Keroro Gunso as Kururu

Macross 7 as Gamlin Kizaki

Mahoromatic as Toh Ryuga

Planetes as Yuri Mihairokoh

Revolutionary Girl Utena as Touga Kiryuu

Turn A Gundam as Gym Ghingnham

Yakitate! Ja-pan as Ryou Kuroyanagi

And many, many more...

Notes[edit]

  • According to the AnimeNewsNetwork database, Takehito Koyasu has performed over 322 anime voice-acting roles, making him one of the most prolific seiyuu in history.
  • Was born in Yokohama.
  • Formed the Weiss group with Miki Shinichiro, Tomokazu Seki and Hiro Yuki
  • Currently operates his own seiyuu management group, and is the creator of Weiss Kreuz.
